summary: Added a next-day anchor at the opening to connect directly from chapter 1's aftermath and clarified at the exit why Owen keeps the Grinlow Leaves hidden, supporting chapter 3's later two-day delay before disclosure.
edits: Anchored the opening to the day after chapter 1's late-night C-13 fixation.
Clarified that Owen enters the Hufflepuff room ready to help but not to reveal the manuscript yet.
